summary: Comprehensive Playwright frontend testing of the Ledger/Lens forensic CSV review app (100% client-side). All 22 scenarios from the review request passed cleanly. Upload screen renders, sample data loads 40 transactions producing 15 entities and 19 findings. Entity resolution correctness verified for M K ENTERPRISES (4 aliases, 95% conf, 6 txn, debit ₹11,850 = 5×870+7500), DSOFT BUILDCON (4 aliases, 77% conf), LATA PILLAY (3 aliases, 100% conf). Must-not-merge enforced: Suraj Sarode vs Suraj Sharma, Mukesh Traders vs Mukesh Transport, Jitesh Khandediya vs Jitesh Jain, Rameshwar vs Ramesh Kumar all appear as separate entries. ******4849 entity shows MASKED ACCT badge and a HIGH masked-account finding. All required pattern types present (same_day_duplicate Jitesh ₹2×2, repeated_amount ₹870×5 & ₹3,000×5, recurring ₹3,000 ~31d, masked ×2, round_number ₹7,500/₹2,000, burst, multiple_transfers). Transaction drawer (raw row JSON + match explanation + related patterns) opens/closes. Date drilldown + back works. Search, sort (Total debit), pin (floats to top), investigator notes (localStorage persistence verified), ignore-alias toggle, mark-reviewed toggle, CSV export, JSON export, reset confirm, manual CSV upload all work. Zero console errors and zero page errors throughout.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues. App is well-organized, modules split by concern (normalizer/entityResolver/parser/patternDetector). data-testid coverage is excellent across every interactive element. Dark forensic theme has good contrast (amber accents on slate background). Virtualised transaction table renders without jank. Findings panel categorises by type with counts. localStorage Zustand persistence works without leaking transaction data into storage (only manual decisions persist as documented).

Minor (informational only, not blocking): the file input is hidden (`class="hidden"`) — that is correct UX, but automation must use set_input_files directly without wait_for_selector(visible). No action needed.
seed_data_creation: Created /tmp/test_manual_upload.csv with 3 rows (TEST ENTITY ONE x2 + Another Entity) to verify manual CSV upload pipeline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All scenarios pass on https://entity-resolver-4.preview.emergentagent.com . Sample-data button is the fastest path to a loaded state. Reload purges in-memory transactions (by design — only manual decisions live in localStorage key 'ledger-lens-state'), so testing 'notes persist across reload' requires re-loading sample first. The file input has class='hidden'; use set_input_files directly. Reset uses window.confirm — register a dialog handler that accepts.
